_comment: Quest definitions (PROJECT_CONTEXT.md §3.2). trigger: locked→active condition, evaluated on the needs-decay tick. completion: active→done condition; on success rewards are applied. onceOnly:true quests stay 'done' forever; onceOnly:false quests reset to 'locked' after completion so they can trigger again later (repeatable) — see the doc comment on QuestRunner.tick in game/quests.ts.

quests.name: Watch TV
quests.description: Watch TV like the larva you are
